name: Modus Ponens
description: Applies implication when antecedent is established.

name: Conjunction Introduction
description: Builds a conjunction from two established claims.

name: Conjunction Elimination
description: Extracts one component of a conjunction.

name: Universal Instantiation
description: Applies a universal claim to a specific object.

name: Counterexample
formal_pattern: exists x not P(x) therefore not forall x P(x)

name: Mathematical Induction
formal_pattern: P(0);forall n P(n)->P(n+1) therefore forall n P(n)
